summary: Testing iteration 2 completed successfully. All requested changes verified: default values (timeInterval=2.5s, speed=1), launch counter with INIT/STOP training mode, compact tab bar (45px), compact inline pods mode selector, and side-by-side Speed/Launch buttons. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Launch counter with training mode working perfectly - increments every 2.5s during training
INIT button toggles to STOP during training with proper state management
Counter resets to 0 when starting new training session
Pods mode selector is compact inline layout (flexDirection: row, height: 32px)
Tab bar height reduced to 45px (within expected 50px range)
Speed and Launch buttons properly positioned side by side
All React Native best practices followed
testID attributes present on all interactive elements
BLE mocking clearly documented and working
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Backend tests create and clean up test devices with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 changes verified and working. Default values changed to timeInterval=2.5s and speed=1. Launch counter added with INIT/STOP training mode - counter increments based on timeInterval during training and resets on new session. Tab bar height reduced to 45px. Pods mode selector changed to compact inline row layout. Speed and Launch buttons positioned side by side. All tabs navigate correctly. Language switcher (EN/ES) working. BLE remains MOCKED.

backend_tests.devices_crud: ✓ All CRUD operations working (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
backend_tests.duplicate_handling: ✓ POST with same MAC updates existing device
backend_tests.role_assignment: ✓ Role reassignment unassigns from previous device

frontend_tests.launch_counter: ✓ Visible, shows 0 initially, increments during training, stops when training stopped, resets on new training
frontend_tests.init_stop_button: ✓ INIT button starts training and changes to STOP, STOP button halts training and changes back to INIT
frontend_tests.training_mode: ✓ Counter increments every 2.5 seconds during training, LIVE badge appears, counter stops after STOP pressed
frontend_tests.button_layout: ✓ Speed and Launch buttons side by side (0px y-difference, 177.5px x-spacing)
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: ✓ All 3 tabs navigate correctly (Controls, Devices, Settings)
frontend_tests.language_switcher: ✓ EN ↔ ES switching works, all text translates correctly
frontend_tests.visual_design: ✓ All spacing, colors, and layout as expected
